description: Promotional offer bundling a complimentary item or product with purchase to increase perceived value and drive immediate sales during seasonal or special occasions.
structural_recipe: Lead with emotional seasonal hook (Eid, holiday reference). State main product with visual appeal emoji. Clearly announce the free gift/bonus item. Use urgency language ('limited time', 'don't miss', 'order now'). Include product category emojis. Structure as: [Seasonal Hook] + [Main Product] + [Free Gift Announcement] + [CTA with Urgency]. Pair with product photography showing both items.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers respond strongly to value perception and limited-time offers, especially during cultural celebrations (Eid). Free gifts create psychological win-feeling and reduce purchase hesitation. Urgency language ('اطلبوه الحين' - order now) triggers FOMO. Seasonal timing aligns with spending behavior peaks and family gatherings where food sharing is central to cultural practice.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure seasonal references are culturally appropriate (Eid, national celebrations)
Verify promotional terms comply with local advertising regulations
Confirm gift item is desirable and value-matched to main product
Time campaigns around actual cultural/holiday calendars for authenticity
cultural_constraints: Must respect Islamic calendar timing (Eid, Ramadan context)
Gift value should feel generous without appearing wasteful
Emphasis on family/togetherness aligns with Saudi social values
